name: openEuler sig-K8sDistro SIG
description: The K8sDistro team is responsible for developing and maintaining the distribution of Kubernetes in the openEuler community, such as KubeSphere and OKD.

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-K8sDistro SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The K8sDistro team is responsible for developing and maintaining the distribution of Kubernetes in the openEuler community, such as KubeSphere and OKD.. The SIG has 10 core members and maintains 23 repositories in the Cloud Computing and Containers domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-K8sDistro SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-K8sDistro SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at dev@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-K8sDistro SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-K8sDistro SIG maintains 23 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-K8sDistro.
